skills.name: linux-container-apparmor-profile-audit
skills.description: Audit container AppArmor profiles — verify AppArmor confinement for container processes, identify containers with unconfined profiles, and audit policy effectiveness.

skills.name: linux-container-cgroups-v1-release-agent-detect
skills.description: Detect cgroups v1 container escape via release_agent (CVE-2022-0492) — identify writable release_agent files, notify_on_release abuse, and container escape prerequisites.

skills.name: linux-container-namespace-user-privesc-detect
skills.description: Detect user namespace privilege escalation — identify unprivileged user namespace abuse, newuidmap/newgidmap exploitation, and namespace-based sandbox escape.

skills.name: linux-container-seccomp-profile-audit
skills.description: Audit container seccomp profiles — analyze Docker/Kubernetes seccomp policies for dangerous syscalls, identify containers running without seccomp, and compare against default profiles.

skills.name: linux-forensic-artifact-bash-history-collect
skills.description: Collect and preserve shell history artifacts for forensic investigation — acquire .bash_history, .zsh_history, and in-memory history from all users including cleared history artifacts.

skills.name: linux-forensic-artifact-recently-used-analyze
skills.description: Analyze recently-used file artifacts on Linux — extract GTK recently-used.xbel, KDE recent documents, and XDG runtime artifacts to reconstruct user/attacker file access timeline.

skills.name: linux-forensic-artifact-ssh-known-hosts-analyze
skills.description: Analyze SSH known_hosts files for forensic intelligence — extract host fingerprints, identify lateral movement targets, detect unusual hosts, and correlate with network connections.

skills.name: linux-forensic-artifact-thumbnails-analyze
skills.description: Analyze thumbnail cache artifacts for forensic investigation — extract GNOME/KDE thumbnail databases to recover deleted image evidence and reconstruct accessed file history.

skills.name: linux-forensic-mem-volatility-linux-analyze
skills.description: Analyze Linux memory dumps with Volatility3 — enumerate processes, network connections, kernel modules, bash history from memory, and detect in-memory rootkits.

skills.name: linux-forensic-timeline-plaso-create-configure
skills.description: Create a forensic super-timeline of a Linux system using Plaso (log2timeline) — aggregate artifacts from filesystem, logs, shell history, browser data into a unified timeline.

skills.name: linux-fs-coredump-artifact-collect
skills.description: Collect and analyze core dump artifacts — configure core dump destinations, extract credentials and sensitive data from process core dumps, detect malicious core dump triggers.

skills.name: linux-fs-fat32-efi-partition-forensic
skills.description: Forensic analysis of the EFI System Partition (ESP) — enumerate ESP contents, detect rogue EFI applications, check bootloader integrity, and identify persistence via ESP.

skills.name: linux-fs-fuse-rootkit-detect
skills.description: Detect FUSE-based filesystem rootkits — identify user-space filesystem mounts that intercept file operations to hide files or manipulate data transparently.

skills.name: linux-fs-inotify-evasion-detect
skills.description: Detect inotify watch evasion — identify techniques to bypass filesystem monitoring (rename tricks, O_CREAT patterns, FIFO bypass) used by malware to avoid detection.

skills.name: linux-fs-overlayfs-layer-analyze
skills.description: Analyze OverlayFS layers used by container runtimes — inspect upper/lower/work directories, detect file modifications within containers, and recover deleted container artifacts.

skills.name: linux-fs-quota-abuse-detect
skills.description: Detect disk quota abuse — identify quota bypass techniques, soft/hard limit manipulation, and quota exhaustion attacks used for denial of service.

skills.name: linux-fs-squashfs-unpack-analyze
skills.description: Unpack and analyze SquashFS images from AppImage, Snap packages, or embedded Linux — extract contents, verify integrity, and scan for malicious payloads.

skills.name: linux-harden-apparmor-profile-create-configure
skills.description: Create and enforce AppArmor profiles for applications — generate profiles in complain mode, analyze violations, convert to enforce mode, and validate confinement.

skills.name: linux-harden-aslr-nx-configure-verify
skills.description: Verify and configure ASLR and NX/DEP stack protection — check randomization level, verify NX bit on stack/heap, audit execstack binaries, and configure system-wide settings.

skills.name: linux-harden-grsecurity-patch-assess-audit
skills.description: Assess Grsecurity/PaX kernel hardening patch effectiveness — evaluate RBAC policy, UDEREF, SMEP/SMAP enforcement, and PAX_MEMORY_SANITIZE configuration.

skills.name: linux-harden-kernel-config-audit
skills.description: Audit kernel build configuration for security settings — review /boot/config-*, check for missing hardening options (CFI, SMEP, SMAP, KASLR, KPTI) against security benchmarks.

skills.name: linux-harden-selinux-policy-audit
skills.description: Audit SELinux policy effectiveness — review policy modules, identify permissive domains, audit-allow rules, and detect policy weaknesses that allow privilege escalation.

skills.name: linux-harden-sysctl-kernel-harden
skills.description: Harden Linux kernel via sysctl parameters — configure ASLR, kernel pointer hiding, TCP hardening, SYN cookies, ICMP restrictions, and core dump disabling.

skills.name: linux-hw-cpu-microcode-integrity-verify
skills.description: Verify CPU microcode integrity and update status to ensure hardware-level mitigations are applied against known CPU vulnerabilities.

skills.name: linux-hw-cpu-spectre-meltdown-detect
skills.description: Detect Spectre and Meltdown hardware side-channel vulnerability exposure on Linux systems via microcode version checks, kernel mitigations, and CPU flags.

skills.name: linux-hw-mem-cold-boot-artifact-collect
skills.description: Collect memory artifacts from a cold boot attack — physical memory dump techniques, DIMM cooling, and live memory acquisition before volatile data is lost.

skills.name: linux-hw-storage-nvme-forensic
skills.description: Forensic acquisition and analysis of NVMe block devices — raw image creation, wear leveling artifact analysis, and deleted data recovery from NVMe SSDs.

skills.name: linux-hw-thunderbolt-dma-attack-detect
skills.description: Detect Thunderbolt DMA attack vectors (Thunderspy) — enumerate Thunderbolt devices, check security levels, and detect unauthorized DMA access to host memory.

skills.name: linux-hw-tpm-pcr-attestation-verify
skills.description: Verify TPM PCR values and perform remote attestation to confirm system boot integrity — detect PCR tampering indicating bootkit or firmware compromise.

skills.name: linux-id-gshadow-group-audit
skills.description: Audit /etc/gshadow and group privilege assignments — identify groups with excessive members, sudo-equivalent groups (wheel, sudo, docker, disk), and shadow group misconfigurations.

skills.name: linux-id-pam-module-backdoor-detect
skills.description: Detect malicious PAM module insertion — identify unauthorized .so files in /lib/security/, modules logging credentials, and modified pam.d configurations.

skills.name: linux-id-pam-stack-bypass-detect
skills.description: Detect PAM authentication stack bypass — identify pam_permit abuse, 'sufficient' control flag manipulation, and PAM stack modifications that bypass authentication.

skills.name: linux-id-polkit-privilege-escalate-detect
skills.description: Detect polkit privilege escalation (PwnKit CVE-2021-4034, CVE-2021-3560) — identify pkexec abuse, unauthorized polkit policy modifications, and privilege escalation via D-Bus.

skills.name: linux-id-shadow-file-tamper-detect
skills.description: Detect /etc/shadow and /etc/passwd tampering — identify unauthorized modifications to credential stores, added backdoor accounts, and hash algorithm downgrades.

skills.name: linux-id-ssh-authorized-keys-backdoor-detect
skills.description: Detect SSH authorized_keys backdoors — scan all user ~/.ssh/authorized_keys for unauthorized keys, detect non-standard AuthorizedKeysFile locations, and identify key-based persistence.

skills.name: linux-id-ssh-config-harden
skills.description: Harden SSH server configuration (sshd_config) — disable root login, enforce key-only auth, restrict ciphers, set idle timeout, enable strict mode, and validate config.

skills.name: linux-kernel-boot-grub-tamper-detect
skills.description: Detect GRUB bootloader tampering — check GRUB binary hashes, grub.cfg integrity, password protection, and unauthorized menu entries that could load malicious kernels.

skills.name: linux-kernel-boot-initramfs-backdoor-detect
skills.description: Detect malicious modifications to initramfs/initrd — unpack and inspect early userspace for backdoored binaries, added scripts, or unauthorized kernel modules.

skills.name: linux-kernel-boot-kexec-abuse-detect
skills.description: Detect kexec abuse — identify unauthorized kernel replacement via kexec_load syscall, which allows loading a new kernel without hardware reboot (bypasses Secure Boot).

skills.name: linux-kernel-boot-secure-boot-bypass-detect
skills.description: Detect Secure Boot bypass techniques — MOK (Machine Owner Key) abuse, shim loader manipulation, unsigned module loading, and UEFI variable tampering.

skills.name: linux-kernel-boot-uefi-variable-tamper-detect
skills.description: Detect unauthorized UEFI variable manipulation — monitor EFI variable store for persistence via NVRAM, rogue boot entries, and BootOrder manipulation.

skills.name: linux-kernel-ebpf-map-covert-channel-detect
skills.description: Detect eBPF maps used as covert communication channels — identify BPF maps shared between processes for inter-process communication bypassing normal IPC auditing.

skills.name: linux-kernel-ebpf-rootkit-detect
skills.description: Detect eBPF-based rootkits (Boopkit, bad-bpf) — identify unauthorized BPF programs hiding processes, files, or network connections via BPF map inspection and program enumeration.

skills.name: linux-kernel-ebpf-verifier-bypass-detect
skills.description: Detect eBPF verifier bypass exploits — identify malformed BPF programs exploiting verifier bugs (CVE-2021-3490, CVE-2022-23222) to achieve kernel code execution.

skills.name: linux-kernel-mem-dma-attack-detect
skills.description: Detect Direct Memory Access attacks targeting kernel memory — PCI device enumeration anomalies, IOMMU bypass attempts, and unauthorized DMA-capable device insertion.

skills.name: linux-kernel-mem-huge-pages-covert-detect
skills.description: Detect huge pages timing side-channel attacks — identify processes abusing huge pages for ASLR entropy reduction or cross-process memory probing.

skills.name: linux-kernel-mem-kaslr-bypass-detect
skills.description: Detect KASLR (Kernel Address Space Layout Randomization) bypass attempts — side-channel leaks via /proc/kallsyms, timing attacks, and information disclosure vulnerabilities.

skills.name: linux-kernel-mem-kpti-bypass-detect
skills.description: Detect Kernel Page Table Isolation (KPTI/KAISER) bypass attempts — Meltdown exploitation indicators, kernel address leaks, and PTI disablement via cmdline.

skills.name: linux-kernel-mem-slab-corruption-detect
skills.description: Detect kernel slab heap corruption — identify heap spray attempts, use-after-free patterns in kernel allocators (SLUB/SLAB/SLOB), and kernel oops artifacts.

skills.name: linux-kernel-modules-blacklist-audit
skills.description: Audit kernel module blacklists — review /etc/modprobe.d/ blacklist entries, identify missing critical blacklists (cramfs, freevxfs, usb-storage), and verify enforcement.

skills.name: linux-kernel-modules-signing-verify
skills.description: Verify kernel module signing — check module signatures against trusted keys, detect unsigned or invalidly-signed modules loaded into the kernel.

skills.name: linux-kernel-network-stack-netfilter-iptables-audit
skills.description: Forensic audit of iptables rules — enumerate all tables/chains, detect firewall rule tampering, identify rules that allow unauthorized traffic or disable logging.

skills.name: linux-kernel-network-stack-netfilter-nftables-audit
skills.description: Forensic audit of nftables rules — enumerate nft tables/chains/rules, detect unauthorized modifications, and identify rules bypassing security controls.

skills.name: linux-kernel-network-stack-netlink-socket-abuse-detect
skills.description: Detect Netlink socket privilege abuse — identify processes using Netlink to modify routing, firewall rules, or network interfaces without going through standard tools.

skills.name: linux-kernel-network-stack-raw-socket-abuse-detect
skills.description: Detect raw socket abuse by unprivileged processes — identify CAP_NET_RAW abuse, packet sniffing without legitimate tools, and packet injection via raw sockets.

skills.name: linux-kernel-network-stack-tc-covert-channel-detect
skills.description: Detect Traffic Control (tc) covert channels — identify malicious tc filters or qdiscs used to exfiltrate data or create timing-based covert communication.

skills.name: linux-kernel-network-stack-xdp-rootkit-detect
skills.description: Detect XDP (eXpress Data Path) based rootkits — identify malicious XDP programs attached to network interfaces that silently drop or redirect traffic.

skills.name: linux-kernel-syscall-io-uring-abuse-detect
skills.description: Detect io_uring syscall interface abuse — identify exploitation of io_uring vulnerabilities (CVE-2022-29582, CVE-2023-2598) and unauthorized use for sandboxed process escape.

skills.name: linux-kernel-syscall-ptrace-abuse-detect
skills.description: Detect ptrace syscall abuse beyond process injection — unauthorized debugger attachment, credential scraping from traced processes, and ptrace-based sandbox escape.

skills.name: linux-kernel-syscall-seccomp-filter-harden
skills.description: Apply and audit seccomp-BPF filters to restrict syscall surface — create minimal syscall allowlists, verify filter inheritance, and test filter effectiveness.

skills.name: linux-kernel-syscall-userfaultfd-race-detect
skills.description: Detect userfaultfd-based race condition exploits — identify processes using userfaultfd to slow kernel operations and win race conditions in privilege escalation.

skills.name: linux-log-auditd-bypass-detect
skills.description: Detect auditd bypass and evasion techniques — identify LD_PRELOAD hooking of audit libraries, auditd process termination, rule flooding, and buffer overflow evasion.

skills.name: linux-log-journald-binary-tamper-detect
skills.description: Detect systemd journal log tampering — identify journal file corruption, log rotation abuse, unauthorized journal forwarding, and missing entries indicating attacker log removal.

skills.name: linux-log-lastlog-tamper-detect
skills.description: Detect lastlog file tampering — identify modifications to /var/log/lastlog that erase attacker last-login timestamps, commonly done after initial compromise.

skills.name: linux-log-syslog-forwarding-harden
skills.description: Harden syslog forwarding configuration — configure TLS-encrypted log forwarding (rsyslog/syslog-ng), prevent log injection, and set up centralized SIEM integration securely.

skills.name: linux-log-utmp-wtmp-tamper-detect
skills.description: Detect utmp/wtmp login record tampering — identify modifications to /var/run/utmp, /var/log/wtmp, /var/log/btmp used to erase attacker login history.

skills.name: linux-mem-aslr-entropy-analyze
skills.description: Analyze ASLR implementation strength on Linux — measure address randomization entropy, identify ASLR-defeating techniques (brute force, info leaks), and verify ASLR configuration.

skills.name: linux-mem-heap-use-after-free-detect
skills.description: Detect heap use-after-free vulnerabilities in userland applications — identify dangling pointer dereferences, double-free conditions, and heap metadata corruption.

skills.name: linux-mem-nx-bypass-detect
skills.description: Detect NX/DEP bypass techniques — identify ret2libc chains, JIT spraying, and return-oriented programming attacks that execute code from non-executable memory regions.

skills.name: linux-mem-stack-canary-bypass-detect
skills.description: Detect stack canary bypass techniques — identify stack smashing attempts, canary leak via format strings, and ret2libc/ROP chains in application crashes.

skills.name: linux-net-apache-config-audit
skills.description: Security audit of Apache httpd configuration — review ServerTokens, directory indexing, mod_status exposure, .htaccess risks, and SSL/TLS configuration weaknesses.

skills.name: linux-net-cups-rce-detect
skills.description: Detect CUPS Remote Code Execution exploitation (CVE-2024-47176, CVE-2024-47076) — identify unauthorized IPP requests, cups-browsed external connections, and PPD injection.

skills.name: linux-net-dns-server-zone-exfil-detect
skills.description: Detect DNS zone transfer data exfiltration — identify unauthorized AXFR/IXFR requests, misconfigured BIND allow-transfer ACLs, and DNS zone data as exfiltration vector.

skills.name: linux-net-docker-socket-expose-detect
skills.description: Detect exposed Docker daemon socket — identify bind-mounted /var/run/docker.sock in containers (instant root escape), TCP Docker API exposure, and unauthorized socket access.

skills.name: linux-net-nginx-config-audit
skills.description: Security audit of nginx web server configuration — check for server version exposure, insecure headers, directory traversal, misconfigured SSL/TLS, and open proxy risks.

skills.name: linux-net-ssh-brute-detect
skills.description: Detect SSH brute force attacks — analyze /var/log/auth.log for failed authentication patterns, configure fail2ban rules, and identify credential stuffing campaigns.

skills.name: linux-net-ssh-tunnel-detect
skills.description: Detect unauthorized SSH tunneling — identify LocalForward/RemoteForward/DynamicForward connections, SOCKS proxy via SSH, and SSH as a covert C2 channel.

skills.name: linux-proc-elf-got-hook-detect
skills.description: Detect GOT (Global Offset Table) hooking in ELF binaries — identify runtime function pointer overwrites used by rootkits and malware to intercept shared library calls.

skills.name: linux-proc-elf-plt-hook-detect
skills.description: Detect PLT (Procedure Linkage Table) hooking — identify function interception via PLT/GOT manipulation in running processes or ELF binary patching.

skills.name: linux-proc-elf-section-inject-detect
skills.description: Detect ELF binary section injection — identify extra sections added to system binaries, unusual section names, and section-based persistence in modified executables.

skills.name: linux-proc-proc-cmdline-spoof-detect
skills.description: Detect process name and cmdline spoofing — identify processes manipulating argv[0], prctl(PR_SET_NAME), or /proc/self/comm to disguise malicious activity.

skills.name: linux-proc-proc-mem-inject-detect
skills.description: Detect /proc/pid/mem write injection — identify processes writing to other processes via the /proc filesystem mem file, a stealthy injection technique requiring only ptrace_attach.

skills.name: linux-proc-signal-handler-hijack-detect
skills.description: Detect signal handler hijacking — identify processes registering unusual signal handlers (SIGSEGV, SIGILL) to gain code execution or persist through crashes.

skills.name: linux-shell-alias-hijack-detect
skills.description: Detect shell alias hijacking — identify malicious aliases overriding common commands (ls, ps, netstat, sudo) in .bashrc or /etc/profile.d/ used by rootkits to hide activity.

skills.name: linux-shell-completion-backdoor-detect
skills.description: Detect shell completion script backdoors — identify malicious completion functions in /etc/bash_completion.d/ or ~/.bash_completion that execute commands on tab-completion events.

skills.name: linux-shell-environment-variable-audit
skills.description: Audit shell environment variables across all running processes — identify sensitive data in environment, dangerous overrides, and variables used for privilege escalation.

skills.name: linux-shell-history-tamper-detect
skills.description: Detect shell history tampering — identify HISTFILE=/dev/null tricks, HISTSIZE=0, history deletion, and commands to disable history recording used to cover attacker tracks.

skills.name: linux-shell-profile-backdoor-detect
skills.description: Detect shell profile backdoors — scan .bashrc, .bash_profile, .profile, .zshrc, /etc/profile.d/ for injected commands, reverse shells, and credential harvesting hooks.

skills.name: linux-supply-binary-hash-verify
skills.description: Verify system binary integrity via hash comparison — baseline critical binaries (ls, ps, netstat, sshd), detect replacements, and identify trojanized executables.

skills.name: linux-supply-package-apt-integrity-verify
skills.description: Verify Debian/Ubuntu package integrity — use debsums to check installed file hashes, validate apt repository GPG signatures, and detect tampered packages.

skills.name: linux-supply-package-hook-persist-detect
skills.description: Detect persistence via package manager hooks — identify malicious dpkg/apt pre/post-install hooks, rpm scriptlets, and pacman hooks that execute attacker code on package operations.

skills.name: linux-supply-package-rpm-integrity-verify
skills.description: Verify RPM package integrity — use rpm -V to check all installed file attributes, validate GPG signatures, and detect modified system binaries.

skills.name: linux-supply-shared-library-preload-detect
skills.description: Detect /etc/ld.so.preload backdoors and LD_PRELOAD injection — identify unauthorized entries forcing malicious shared libraries into every process's address space.

skills.name: linux-svc-at-job-persist-detect
skills.description: Detect at/batch job persistence — enumerate scheduled at jobs, identify unusual one-time execution jobs used for delayed payload execution or persistence.

skills.name: linux-svc-cron-job-backdoor-detect
skills.description: Detect cron job backdoors — enumerate all crontab locations (/etc/cron*, /var/spool/cron), identify unusual jobs, detect cron file modification, and audit cron permissions.

skills.name: linux-svc-logrotate-race-exploit
skills.description: Exploit and detect the logrotate race condition vulnerability (CVE-2016-1247) — symlink race during log rotation allowing privilege escalation to root.

skills.name: linux-svc-motd-script-backdoor-detect
skills.description: Detect /etc/update-motd.d/ script backdoors — identify unauthorized executable scripts in MOTD directories that execute as root on every SSH login for persistence or C2.

skills.name: linux-svc-rc-local-backdoor-detect
skills.description: Detect rc.local and SysV init script backdoors — inspect /etc/rc.local, /etc/init.d/, and runlevel-specific directories for unauthorized startup scripts.

skills.name: linux-svc-systemd-timer-persist-detect
skills.description: Detect systemd timer-based persistence — enumerate all .timer units, identify timers not associated with legitimate services, and detect cron replacement via systemd timers.

skills.name: linux-svc-systemd-unit-persist-detect
skills.description: Detect systemd service and unit file persistence — scan all unit directories for unauthorized services, check WantedBy/RequiredBy dependencies, and identify post-exploit persistence.

skills.name: linux-svc-udev-rule-persist-detect
skills.description: Detect udev rule persistence — inspect /etc/udev/rules.d/ and /lib/udev/rules.d/ for unauthorized rules that execute commands on device events, commonly used for persistence.

skills.name: soc-hunting-lateralmov
skills.description: Detects remote instantiation of MMC20.Application DCOM object by monitoring

skills.name: soc-hunting-ntlm
skills.description: Detects a single host responding to LLMNR (UDP 5355) or NBT-NS (UDP 137)

skills.name: windows-lolbins
skills.description: Detects certutil.exe being used to download files from remote URLs,
